seo.title: Electrician Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your electrical business. Route upset customers to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Electricians
hero.subheading: Power back on feels like relief, not a photo moment. ReviewFlo sends the ask once the panel is safe and the invoice is paid.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Electrician Faces

items.heading: Good work hides behind walls
items.body: Customers do not see the craftsmanship.

items.heading: Estimate versus invoice fights blow up online
items.body: Surprise costs turn into angry stars.

items.heading: Emergency calls end with exhaustion, not marketing
items.body: Nobody wants a speech after a late-night outage.

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Send after the job is closed
items.body: Text or email when the lights stay on.

items.heading: Private channel for code or permit worries

items.a: Yes, especially after scary outages or remodels.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Electrician Reviews Today
